summary: Iteration 105: Restaurant Menu Premium Revamp - All features verified. Fixed backend demo data to include ingredients array for View Ingredients feature. 23/23 UI tests passed, 13/13 backend API tests passed.

minor.issue: Demo data was missing ingredients and images arrays - FIXED by adding to backend demo data

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Premium hero header displays restaurant name, cuisine badges, location, rating, hours, and phone correctly
ItemImageCarousel component shows utensils icon placeholder when no images (working as designed)
View Ingredients button appears only on items with ingredients array (conditional rendering working)
IngredientsModal uses Shadcn Dialog with ingredient badges - working correctly
Add to Cart with quantity controls (+/-) working correctly
Cart summary updates with items, quantities, and total in right sidebar
Reservation section is compact with Date/Time in grid layout as requested
Category tab filters work correctly (all, starters, mains, desserts, drinks, specials)
Search dishes input filters menu items correctly
Backend API returns images array in response (empty for demo data)
MenuItemForm supports multi-image upload (max 3 images) - code reviewed
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data with ingredients added
context_for_next_testing_agent: Restaurant Menu Premium Revamp fully verified. All features working: hero header, menu items with image carousel placeholder, View Ingredients modal, Add to Cart with quantity controls, Cart summary, compact Reservation section, category filters, search. Backend demo data now includes ingredients and images arrays.

features: Image carousel placeholder (utensils icon when no images)
Displays item name with Leaf icon
Button enabled when cart has items

endpoints: GET /api/restaurants/{id} - returns restaurant details with rating, location, hours
GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu - returns items with images and ingredients arrays
